meaning: adj.扣押的,隐退的,幽静的,偏僻的
examples: This jury is expected to be sequestered for at least two months.
He argues that there are certain abilities that tend to be more sequestered for males, and other abilities that are more sequestered, more focused on females.
Oil that had been drifting toward Florida has been essentially sequestered in a counter-clockwise eddy.
Pilots would remain safely sequestered behind those fortress doors regardless of mayhem in the cabin.
